item.title: Return of the Meme: 1695 (pigeon art)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. (As someone who has cut scars, this made me laugh)
A map of Scotland made with local rocks to the region on the map.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "what's a pipipipip boy? [tiny conure laughter] [kisses]" _____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Was the Robert Harward who spoke on Fox a fake?
item.description: Watch with sound on. My partner and I are picking it apart with comparison videos with one other interview Harward did recently. Wild. If it was a fake, why? *post edited for typos https://thetab.com/2026/05/22/wait-did-fox-news-actually-just-interview-a-man-in-a-mask-the-bizarre-theory-explained

item.title: GovBrief Today #476
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson sent the House home Thursday rather than vote on Trump's war. He didn't have the votes. Senate Republicans also walked away from Trump's $72 billion immigration enforcement bill, and Mitch McConnell called Trump's $1.8 billion slush fund "utterly stupid, morally wrong." The Senate went home too. Tens of thousands of service members stuck in the Gulf war zone don't get a three-day weekend. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell Congress to end the war when they return from Memorial Day recess. I've emailed 7,520 stories over 476 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260521-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/sd-shooter [2] https://go.govbrief.today/poland-deployment [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may21 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-wedding [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ebola-dulles [6] https://go.govbrief.today/albanese-sanctions [7] https://go.govbrief.today/refrigerant [8] https://go.govbrief.today/la-map [9] https://go.govbrief.today/voter-rolls-judges [10] https://go.govbrief.today/cfpb-advisories [11] https://go.govbrief.today/fla-biologist [12] https://go.govbrief.today/minn-fraud [13] https://go.govbrief.today/iv-execution [14] https://go.govbrief.today/womens-museum [15] https://go.govbrief.today/keane-weeks [16] https://go.govbrief.today/gop-ice-bill [17] https://go.govbrief.today/gop-war-powers [18] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-faith [19] https://go.govbrief.today/quantum-equity [20] https://go.govbrief.today/ai-order-postponed [21] https://go.govbrief.today/fac-arch [22] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-charges Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Thanks for the support, Imgur!!!
item.description: I made my way into a three-year program for teacher leaders/administration, improving communication and collaboration skills, overall just being a better leader for colleagues. Plus they'll pay me $35k to complete the whole program. I'm so proud of me!!!

item.title: My Sunday plans
item.description:
I got a text from the humane society CEO, Spencer (@AlabamaAnimalRescuer), on Wednesday that he needs a transport for an FIV cat about five hours away (FIV is like HIV in people, basically just a much-reduced immune system). The shelter in Monroe has kept her for a while but they just don’t have space for her anymore. Our GHHS has an entire building dedicated to FIV and FELV cats, so Spencer was ON the job and of course agreed
He connected me with the woman at the shelter
She can’t do the actual driving but she found someone to do it!
Luckily, the driver and I can both make this Sunday work.
So I guess I’m headed out at 10:00am Sunday!
And just LOOK at her. I mean…gorgeous. I can’t wait to meet her!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: 2nd attempt, as I am struggling with grammar.
item.description: I applied for an Aspiring Leaders fellowship through TeachMichigan last month and today is the day that they send out the emails. It's a highly-regarded three-year program for teacher leaders (me) and upcoming administration (DEFINITELY not me). Plus they'll pay me $35k throughout the program. I really want this, gang. MV Edit/Update: I FUCKING GOT IT!!!!!!!
item.dc:creator: GratingBobShrillPants
